final:
module ring_counter(
    input reset_clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [4:0] count
);
    initial begin
        count = 5'b00001; // Initial state when reset
    end

    always @(posedge reset_clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 5'b00001; // Reset to initial state
        end else begin
            count <= {count[3:0], count[4]}; // Shift left
        end
    end
endmodule
